mapper.select: SELECT sugg_no, sugg_title, sugg_content, sugg_writer, sugg_pw, sugg_answer, sugg_cdate, sugg_mdate, sugg_usage FROM suggestion WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suggestion ( sugg_no, sugg_title, sugg_content, sugg_writer, sugg_pw, sugg_answer, sugg_cdate, sugg_usage ) VALUES ( SUGG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{sugg_title}, #{sugg_content}, #{sugg_writer}, #{sugg_pw}, 'N', SYSDATE, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE suggestion SET sugg_title = #{sugg_title}, sugg_content = #{sugg_content}, sugg_pw = #{sugg_pw}, sugg_answer = #{sugg_answer}, sugg_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
UPDATE suggestion SET sugg_usage = 'N', sugg_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
